message:
feat(pager): ARC-based page cache with adaptive scan resistance

Refactor the page cache to use an Adaptive Replacement Cache (ARC)
algorithm that balances recency and frequency, providing scan resistance
that simple LRU lacks. This prevents sequential table scans from evicting
frequently-accessed index pages.

Key additions:
- New page_cache/arc_cache.rs implementing the ARC eviction policy with
  four internal lists (T1/T2 for cached, B1/B2 for ghost entries)
- Adaptive tuning parameter that shifts balance between recency and
  frequency based on observed access patterns
- Integration with the existing page cache interface

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
